---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Description of Bug
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Expected behaviour
A clear and concise description of the expected behaviour of the code.

## Actual behaviour
Relevant evidence of the problem with as much diagnostic information as possible including but not limited to any output from compilation or runtime use (whichever may be applicable) or any relevant output from non-breaking runs of the code that demonstrates erroneous behaviour.

## Screenshots
Attach any applicable screenshots but only for information that strictly requires imagery (please include any text output like terminal output in the actual text of the bug report).

## Setup
  - Spack version: [eg. v0.23.1]
  - Compiler (and version): [eg. gcc 13.3.0]
  - Python version: [eg. 3.12]
  - SYCL-relevant hardware specifications (such as CPU architecture, GPU hardware and driver specs): [eg. Intel-Skylake CPU, Nvidia A100 GPU with CUDA 11.1]
  - Environment details: [eg. running locally, running in a cluster environment or running within a container]
